title: North Barris Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''North Barris Spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] in [[North Barris]], [[Pakrik Minor]]. Its landing pads were little more than raised pads of [[Ferrocrete/Legends|ferrocrete]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
